site.name: DevTools
site.title: DevTools — Free Online Developer Utilities
site.description: 21+ free, open-source developer tools that run entirely in your browser: JSON formatter, SQL formatter & visualizer, Base64 encoder, JWT decoder, regex tester, UUID generator, and more. No signup, no tracking — your data never leaves your machine.
site.author: venki0552

tools.name: JSON Parser & Formatter
tools.description: Parse, format, minify, and explore JSON with intelligent auto-fix for malformed input.

tools.name: XML Formatter
tools.description: Format, validate, and explore XML documents with structure analysis.

tools.name: SQL Formatter
tools.description: Format and beautify SQL queries with dialect-aware indentation.

tools.name: GraphQL Formatter
tools.description: Format GraphQL queries and explore SDL schemas with type inspection.

tools.name: CSV ↔ JSON
tools.description: Convert between CSV and JSON with smart delimiter detection and type inference.

tools.name: YAML ↔ JSON
tools.description: Convert between YAML and JSON with round-trip validation and anchor resolution.

tools.name: Base64 Encode / Decode
tools.description: Encode and decode Base64 for text and files with auto-detection.

tools.name: JWT Decoder
tools.description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens with claim analysis and expiry checking.

tools.name: URL Encode / Decode
tools.description: Encode, decode, and parse URLs with query string inspection and builder.

tools.name: Hash Generator
tools.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 hashes for text and files.

tools.name: Regex Tester
tools.description: Test regular expressions with live highlighting, group capture, and pattern library.

tools.name: CRON Builder
tools.description: Build and decode cron expressions with visual editor and next-run preview.

tools.name: HTTP Status Codes
tools.description: Quick reference for all HTTP status codes with descriptions and common causes.

tools.name: Epoch Converter
tools.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates across timezones.

tools.name: UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate UUIDv4, UUIDv7, and ULID with bulk generation and format options.

tools.name: Color Converter
tools.description: Convert between color formats (HEX, RGB, HSL, Lab, Oklch) with palette generator.

tools.name: Env Var Manager
tools.description: Manage environment variables across projects with import, export, and comparison.

tools.name: JSON Diff
tools.description: Deep diff two JSON objects with tree visualization and JSON Patch output.

tools.name: Text Diff
tools.description: Compare two text files with unified or side-by-side diff view.

tools.name: SQL Visualizer
tools.description: Client-side SQL analysis with join graphs, data flow diagrams, and plain-English explanations.

tools.name: Mock API Generator
tools.description: Generate realistic mock API responses from schemas or descriptions.
